title: Print a Phone Stand
description: Practice 3D printing by making a handy phone stand.

dialogue.text: Hey there, it's Sydney again! Ready for a quick project? We'll print a simple phone stand. Grab your 3D printer and some PLA.
Clean and level the build plate, load PLA filament, then slice the stand STL and begin printing. Keep hands away from the hot nozzle and ensure the area is ventilated.

options.text: The stand is finished and cooled!

dialogue.text: Great job! Let the print cool before removing it, then enjoy a sturdy stand for your phone. Remember to turn off the printer.
